name: Olive Garden Eggplant Parmigiana
recipeInstructions:
1. Moisten eggplant slices and coat lightly with flour.
2. Quickly brown the slices in hot oil, dusting each side generously with seasoned salt.
3. When fork-tender and golden brown, transfer to a jelly roll pan.
4. Cover loosely with foil and bake at 375°F for about 20 to 25 minutes, or until tender. Use approximately 8 slices of sauce.
5. Combine the sauce, grape jelly, and tomatoes that have been broken up with a fork in a bowl. Heat on medium until piping hot. Ensure the jelly is melted.
6. Arrange 2 slices of eggplant on each of 4 plates. Cover each with 1 slice of mozzarella.
7. Ladle sauce over all, not to cover completely.
8. Place plates back in the oven for just a few minutes to melt the cheese and serve promptly.
